title: Liam Watts
extract:
Liam Watts (born 8 July 1990) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop forward for the Goole Vikings in the RFL Championship. He is an England Knights international.
He has previously played for Hull Kingston Rovers and Hull FC in the Super League. He has spent time on loan at Gateshead Thunder and Doncaster RLFC in the RFL Championship.
